name: Flavored Popcorn
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Dry Blue Cheese Dip Mix with
1 teaspoon Curry Powder (with 1 teaspoon Cumin and ½ teaspoon Garlic Salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a serving size of 1 quart of freshly made popcorn, select one of the listed flavor combinations.
2. Add the chosen flavor(s) to the melted butter or margarine.
3. For strawberry-flavored popcorn, include the Strawberry Flavor Drink Mix.
4. For Cappuccino-flavored popcorn, use the Instant Cappuccino Flavoring.
5. To achieve a Blue Cheese flavor, incorporate the Dry Blue Cheese Dip Mix with Garlic Salt.
6. For curry flavor, combine Curry Powder (with 1 teaspoon Cumin and ½ teaspoon Garlic Salt) and Chili Seasoning Mix.
7. Adjust the intensity of the seasoning by adding Tabasco Sauce to taste.
